changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'phim' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'poster' AND ( DATA_TYPE <> 'nvarchar' OR CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH IS NULL OR CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH <> -1 ) ) BEGIN ALTER TABLE phim ALTER COLUMN poster NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL; END

IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'phim' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'mota' AND ( DATA_TYPE <> 'nvarchar' OR CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH IS NULL OR CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH <> -1 ) ) BEGIN ALTER TABLE phim ALTER COLUMN mota NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL; END

IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'phim' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'trailer' AND ( DATA_TYPE <> 'nvarchar' OR CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH IS NULL OR CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH <> -1 ) ) BEGIN ALTER TABLE phim ALTER COLUMN trailer NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL; END
